title: 日本ダービーの後に・アイツの姿

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Daiwa Scarlet places well in the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, after the race, she can't shake the
feeling that Vodka's stirring performance was true
number one material.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet proclaims she will retake the
number one spot from Vodka, lest her rival get
too far ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Shuka Sho, the last race of the
Triple Tiara.
